features.description: Subprocesses (Bash, hooks, MCP, LSP) no longer inherit OTEL_* env vars, isolating CLI OTLP from child apps
features.reference_changelog_line: Subprocesses (Bash, hooks, MCP, LSP) no longer inherit `OTEL_*` environment variables, so OTEL-instrumented apps run via the Bash tool no longer pick up the CLI's own OTLP endpoint

features.description: MCP server name 'workspace' is now reserved; existing servers with that name are skipped with a warning
features.reference_changelog_line: MCP: `workspace` is now a reserved server name — existing servers with that name will be skipped with a warning

features.description: Reconnecting MCP servers summarize re-announced tools by server prefix instead of dumping full tool-name lists
features.reference_changelog_line: Reconnecting MCP servers no longer flood the conversation with full tool-name lists on every reconnect — re-announced tools are summarized by server prefix

features.description: EnterWorktree now branches from local HEAD instead of origin/<default>, preserving unpushed commits
features.reference_changelog_line: `EnterWorktree` now creates the new branch from local HEAD as documented, instead of `origin/<default-branch>` — unpushed commits are no longer dropped

features.description: Security fix: MCP stdio args no longer corrupted when CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL_PREFIX is set and args contain shell metacharact
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed MCP stdio servers receiving corrupted arguments when `CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL_PREFIX` is set and an argument contains spaces or shell metacharacters

features.description: Security fix: stale installed_plugins.json entries pointing at deleted cache dirs no longer pollute PATH
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed stale `installed_plugins.json` entries pointing at deleted cache directories polluting PATH

features.description: SDK hosts get a persistent localSettings suggestion so 'Always allow' Bash prompts write to .claude/settings.local.json
features.reference_changelog_line: SDK hosts now receive a persistent `localSettings` suggestion for Bash permission prompts, so "Always allow" writes to `.claude/settings.local.json`

features.description: /mcp now displays connected servers' tool count and flags servers that connected with 0 tools
features.reference_changelog_line: `/mcp` now shows the tool count for connected servers and flags servers that connected with 0 tools

features.description: --plugin-dir now accepts .zip plugin archives in addition to directories
features.reference_changelog_line: `--plugin-dir` now accepts `.zip` plugin archives in addition to directories

features.description: --channels works with console API-key auth; managed settings must set channelsEnabled: true to enable
features.reference_changelog_line: `--channels` now works with console (API key) authentication — console orgs with managed settings must set `channelsEnabled: true` to enable

features.description: Auto mode classifier errors now include hint to retry, /compact, or run with --debug
features.reference_changelog_line: Auto mode: when the classifier can't evaluate an action, the error now includes a hint (retry, `/compact`, or run with `--debug`)

features.description: Headless stream-json init.plugin_errors now includes --plugin-dir load failures alongside dependency demotions
features.reference_changelog_line: Headless `--output-format stream-json`: `init.plugin_errors` now includes `--plugin-dir` load failures in addition to dependency demotions

features.description: Gateway /v1/models discovery for /model picker now requires CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_GATEWAY_MODEL_DISCOVERY=1.
features.reference_changelog_line: Gateway `/v1/models` discovery for the `/model` picker is now opt-in via `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_GATEWAY_MODEL_DISCOVERY=1` (was automatic in 2.1.126–2.1.128)

features.description: Ctrl+R history picker now defaults to searching all prompts across all projects; Ctrl+S narrows scope.
features.reference_changelog_line: Ctrl+R history picker now defaults to searching all prompts across all projects, matching pre-2.1.124 behavior. Press Ctrl+S to narrow to the current project or session

features.description: Server-managed settings policy now applies for enterprise OAuth credentials lacking user:inference scope.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed server-managed settings policy not applying for enterprise/team users whose stored OAuth credentials lacked the `user:inference` scope

features.description: OAuth refresh race after wake-from-sleep no longer logs out all running sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed OAuth refresh race after wake-from-sleep that could log out all running sessions

features.description: Bash(mkdir *), Bash(touch *) and similar allow rules now honored for in-project paths.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `Bash(mkdir *)`, `Bash(touch *)` and similar allow rules not being honored for in-project paths

features.description: deniedMcpServers patterns with *:// scheme wildcard now match mixed-case hostnames.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `deniedMcpServers` patterns with a `*://` scheme wildcard not matching mixed-case hostnames

features.description: New --plugin-url <url> flag fetches a plugin .zip archive from a URL for the current session.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `--plugin-url <url>` flag to fetch a plugin `.zip` archive from a URL for the current session

features.description: Plugin manifest themes and monitors should move under experimental; top-level still works but warns.
features.reference_changelog_line: Plugin manifests: `themes` and `monitors` should now be declared under `"experimental": { ... }`. Top-level declarations still work but `claude plugin validate` will warn

features.description: New CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT=1 env var force-enables synchronized output where auto-detection fails.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT=1` env var to force-enable synchronized output on terminals that auto-detection misses (e.g. Emacs `eat`)

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE runs upgrade in background on Homebrew/WinGet installs.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE`: when set on Homebrew or WinGet installations, Claude Code runs the upgrade command in the background and prompts to restart

features.description: skillOverrides setting now works with off, user-invocable-only, and name-only modes.
features.reference_changelog_line: `skillOverrides` setting now works: `off` hides from model and `/`, `user-invocable-only` hides from model only, `name-only` collapses description

features.description: claude_code.pull_request.count OTel metric now counts PRs/MRs created via MCP tools too.
features.reference_changelog_line: The `claude_code.pull_request.count` OTel metric now counts PRs/MRs created via MCP tools, not just shell commands

features.description: Policy refusal error messages now include the API Request ID for easier support debugging.
features.reference_changelog_line: Policy refusal error messages now include the API Request ID for easier support debugging

features.description: --permission-mode flag now honored when resuming plan-mode sessions and plan mode reapplies after ExitPlanMode.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `--permission-mode` flag being ignored when resuming a plan-mode session with `-p --continue`/`--resume`, and plan mode not being re-applied after `ExitPlanMode` within the same session

features.description: Unauthorized claude.ai MCP connectors now report 'needs auth'; headless -p stops retrying non-transient 4xx auth failure
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed unauthorized claude.ai MCP connectors showing as "failed" instead of "needs auth", and headless `-p` mode retrying non-transient 4xx connection failures

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID env var now exposed to Bash tool subprocesses, matching session_id passed to hooks.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` environment variable to the Bash tool subprocess environment, matching the `session_id` passed to hooks

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN=1 opts out of fullscreen renderer and keeps output in terminal scrollback.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN=1` env var to opt out of the fullscreen alternate-screen renderer and keep the conversation in the terminal's native scrollback
